=== info Milwaukee 1981-10-17.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Mecca Auditorium
University of Wisconsin
Milwaukee, Wisconsin
October 17, 1981
 
Gotta Serve Somebody
I Believe In You
Like A Rolling Stone
I Want You
Man Gave Names To All The Animals
Maggie's Farm
Girl Of The North Country
Ballad Of A Thin Man
In The Summertime
All Along The Watchtower
Forever Young
The Rose (Amanda McBroom)
The Times They Are A-Changin'
A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
Slow Train
It's All In The Game (Sigman/Dawes)
Masters Of War
Heart Of Mine
Mr. Tambourine Man
Solid Rock
Just Like A Woman
Just A Little Bit (Del Gordon)
Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power)
When You Gonna Wake Up ?
In The Garden
          *
Blowin' In The Wind
It Ain't Me, Babe
Knockin' On Heaven's Door

audience recording  130 mins
LB-8614 obtained from torrent

Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Fred Tackett (guitar), Steve Ripley (guitar), Al Kooper (keyboards), Tim Drummond (bass), Jim Keltner (drums), Arthur Rosato (drums), Clydie King, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (background vocals).
14 Bob Dylan & Clydie King (shared vocal).
11, 13, 27, 28 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
20 Steve Ripley (vocal).
27 Bob Dylan solo (vocal & guitar).
